title: cynoglossum denticulatum var. zeylanicum
intro: Cynoglossum denticulatum var. zeylanicum, also known as the Toothed Hound's Tongue or Zeylanic Hound's Tongue, is a plant species in the borage family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits associated with Cynoglossum denticulatum var. zeylanicum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to lower fever and alleviate sore throats. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
